title: Document Bureau Core/Ops boundary
goal: Update README, architecture and ownership documentation so operational organs are named as Bureau Ops consumers around the core.

metadata.outcome: Bureau Core/Ops/External Authority boundary documented in README, architecture and ownership docs.

checks: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m bureau.cli --root . check -> valid True
acceptance_summary: README distinguishes Bureau Core, Bureau Ops and external authorities.
Architecture documents a Core/Ops/Authority component model and operational-organ rules.
Ownership clarifies GitHub owns PR/review/CI facts while Bureau Ops may observe or derive findings from them.

acceptance.assertion: README distinguishes Bureau Core, Bureau Ops and external authorities.
Architecture documentation contains a Core/Ops/External Authority component model and rules for operational organs.
Ownership documentation clarifies that GitHub owns PR and CI facts while Bureau Ops may observe or derive findings from them.
